_publications._publicationTitle: Natural history of meningioma development in mice reveals: a synergy of Nf2 and p16(Ink4a) mutations.
_publications._context: To obtain Nf2 flox2/flox2 ;p16 Ink4a*/* mice, Nf2 flox2/flox2 mice (4) on the FVB/N background were bred to p16 Ink4a*/* mice | crossed with NF2 fl/fl animals (RIKEN Bioresource Research Centre) | Nf2 flox/flox mice carrying a LoxP insertion in the Nf2 gene [13] were maintained at the Washington University School of Medicine

_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of YAP/TAZ-driven TEAD activity prevents growth of NF2-null schwannoma and meningioma.
Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.
